verses.text: Micah restores stolen silver; his mother makes an idol. Idol. False worship begins at home.
Micah restores stolen silver; his mother makes an idol. Idol. False worship begins at home.
Micah restores stolen silver; his mother makes an idol. Idol. False worship begins at home.
Micah restores stolen silver; his mother makes an idol. Idol. False worship begins at home.
He makes a house of gods; 'every man did that which was right in his own eyes.' No king. Disorder reigns.
He makes a house of gods; 'every man did that which was right in his own eyes.' No king. Disorder reigns.
A wandering Levite comes seeking a place. The Levite. He sells his calling.
A wandering Levite comes seeking a place. The Levite. He sells his calling.
A wandering Levite comes seeking a place. The Levite. He sells his calling.
Micah hires him as priest, thinking God will bless him. Hired. He trusts in a false worship.
